rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core modeling contribution: both focus on bid-by-bid auction dynamics using reduced-form probabilistic/Bayesian approaches rather than only final outcomes. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior auction work toward bid-level dynamics in procurement, and the cited note is an integrated bid-sequence model (whether/who/when/how much), making this a plausible foundational/comparison reference rather than an incidental mention.
